---
title: "Quarto 1"
author: "Kinson Gao"
format: html
---


```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
penguins
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

penguins |>
  drop_na(bill_length_mm, bill_depth_mm, body_mass_g, species) |>
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = bill_length_mm,
      y = bill_depth_mm,
      color = species,
      size = body_mass_g
    )
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 8), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Penguin Bills by Species",
    subtitle = "Bill length and depth measurements from Palmer Penguins",
    x = "Bill Length (mm)",
    y = "Bill Depth (mm)",
    color = "Species",
    caption = "Source: Palmer Penguins dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```
